headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -76.3)
key_insights: Fears trending up 76% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 128 quotes and 99 at strong intensity - people are seriously venting their anger today.

• At 49.9, frustration levels remain well above the historical average though down from yesterday's peak of 64.4.

• Optimism dropped significantly to -35.0 from yesterday's -12.3, hitting the lower end of its typical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
